        console.error('Error creating publisher:', error);

        this.errorMessage **=** 'Failed to create publisher. Please try again.';

      }

    });

  }

  cancelAddNewPublisher(): void {

    this.isAddingNewPublisher **=** false;

    this.newPublisherName **=** '';

    this.newPublisherCountry **=** '';

    this.newPublisherDescription **=** '';

  }

  toggleYearPicker(): void {

    this.showYearPicker **=** **!**this.showYearPicker;

**if** (this.showYearPicker) {

**const** currentValue **=** this.addBookForm.get('publicationYear')?.value;

**if** (currentValue) {

**const** year **=** parseInt(currentValue, 10);

**if** (**!**isNaN(year) **&&** year **>=** 1000) {

          this.yearRange.start **=** Math.max(1000, year **-** 10);

          this.yearRange.end **=** Math.min(this.currentYear, this.yearRange.start **+** 19);

          this.updateYearsToDisplay();

        }

      }

    }

  }

  updateYearsToDisplay(): void {

    this.yearsToDisplay **=** [];

**for** (**let** year **=** this.yearRange.start; year **<=** this.yearRange.end; year**++**) {

      this.yearsToDisplay.push(year);

    }

  }

  getYearRange(): number[] {

**if** (this.yearsToDisplay.length **===** 0) {

      this.updateYearsToDisplay();

    }

**return** this.yearsToDisplay;

  }

  changeYearRange(delta: number): void {

**const** newStart **=** this.yearRange.start **+** delta;

**if** (newStart **>=** 1000 **&&** newStart **<=** this.currentYear) {

      this.yearRange.start **=** newStart;

      this.yearRange.end **=** Math.min(this.currentYear, this.yearRange.start **+** 19);

      this.updateYearsToDisplay();

    }

  }

  selectYear(year: number): void {

**if** (year **<=** this.currentYear) {

      this.addBookForm.patchValue({ publicationYear: year.toString() });

      this.showYearPicker **=** false;

    }

  }

  handleImageError(event: Event): void {

**const** imgElement **=** event.target **as** HTMLImageElement;

    imgElement.src **=** this.defaultImageUrl;

**if** (this.image?.value **===** imgElement.getAttribute('data-original-src')) {

      this.imageLoadError **=** true;

    }

  }

  onSubmit(): void {

**if** (this.addBookForm.invalid) {

      this.addBookForm.markAllAsTouched();

**return**;

    }

**if** (this.selectedAuthors.length **===** 0) {

      this.errorMessage **=** 'Будь ласка, оберіть хоча б одного автора';

**return**;

    }

**if** (this.selectedGenres.length **===** 0) {

      this.errorMessage **=** 'Будь ласка, оберіть хоча б один жанр';

**return**;

    }

**if** (**!**this.selectedLanguage) {

      this.errorMessage **=** 'Будь ласка оберіть мову';

**return**;

    }

**if** (**!**this.selectedPublisher) {

      this.errorMessage **=** 'Будь ласка оберіть видавництво';

**return**;

    }

    this.isSubmitting **=** true;

    this.errorMessage **=** null;

**const** authors **=** this.selectedAuthors.map(author **=>** {

**return** {

        id: author.id,

        name: author.name

      };

    });

**let** imageUrl **=** this.addBookForm.value.image **||** '';

**if** (this.imageLoadError **||** **!**imageUrl.trim()) {

      imageUrl **=** '';

    }

**const** bookDto **=** {

      title: this.addBookForm.value.name,

      price: parseFloat(this.addBookForm.value.price),

      languageId: this.selectedLanguage?.id **||** 0,

      publisher: {

        id: this.selectedPublisher?.id **||** 0

      },

      numberOfPages: parseInt(this.addBookForm.value.numberOfPages, 10),

      publicationYear: parseInt(this.addBookForm.value.publicationYear, 10),

      isbn: this.addBookForm.value.isbn,

      description: this.addBookForm.value.description **||** '',

      image: imageUrl,

      stockQuantity: parseInt(this.addBookForm.value.stockQuantity, 10),

      authors: this.selectedAuthors

        .filter(author **=>** author.id **!==** undefined)

        .map(author **=>** ({ id: author.id **as** number })),

      genres: this.selectedGenres

        .filter(genre **=>** genre.id **!==** undefined)

        .map(genre **=>** ({ id: genre.id **as** number }))

    };

    console.log('Submitting book:', bookDto);

    this.bookService.addBook(bookDto).subscribe({

      next: () **=>** {

        this.isSubmitting **=** false;

        this.notificationService.success('Книга додана успішно!');

        this.router.navigate(['/books']);

      },

      error: (err) **=>** {

        console.error('Error adding book:', err);

        this.isSubmitting **=** false;

        this.errorMessage **=** err.error?.message **||** 'Виникла помилка при додаванні книги. Будь ласка, спробуйте ще раз.';

      }

    });

  }

**get** name() { **return** this.addBookForm.get('name'); }

**get** price() { **return** this.addBookForm.get('price'); }

**get** numberOfPages() { **return** this.addBookForm.get('numberOfPages'); }

**get** publicationYear() { **return** this.addBookForm.get('publicationYear'); }

**get** isbn() { **return** this.addBookForm.get('isbn'); }

**get** description() { **return** this.addBookForm.get('description'); }

**get** image() { **return** this.addBookForm.get('image'); }

**get** stockQuantity() { **return** this.addBookForm.get('stockQuantity'); }

}

Admin-management.ts

**import** { Component, OnInit } **from** '@angular/core';

**import** { FormBuilder, FormGroup, Validators } **from** '@angular/forms';

**import** { NotificationService } **from** '../../../services/notification.service';

**import** { AuthService } **from** '../../../services/auth.service';

**import** { AdminUser, User } **from** '../../../models/user.model';

@Component({

  selector: 'app-admin-management',

  templateUrl: './admin-management.component.html',

  styleUrls: ['./admin-management.component.css']

})

**export** **class** AdminManagementComponent **implements** OnInit {

  activeTab: 'users' | 'admins' **=** 'users';

  searchForm: FormGroup;

  isLoadingUsers **=** false;

  isLoadingAdmins **=** false;

  errorMessage **=** '';

  allUsers: User[] **=** [];

  filteredUsers: User[] **=** [];

  adminList: AdminUser[] **=** [];

  currentAdminId **=** '';

  // For tracking promotion/removal process

  processingUserId: string | null **=** null;

**constructor**(

**private** fb: FormBuilder,

**private** authService: AuthService,

**private** notificationService: NotificationService

  ) {

    this.searchForm **=** this.fb.group({

      searchTerm: ['', []]

    });

  }

  ngOnInit(): void {

    this.currentAdminId **=** this.authService.currentUserValue?.id **||** '';

    this.loadAllUsers();

    this.loadAdminList();

    // Subscribe to search term changes

    this.searchForm.get('searchTerm')?.valueChanges.subscribe((term: string) **=>** {

      this.filterUsers(term);

    });

  }

  onTabChange(tab: 'users' | 'admins'): void {

    this.activeTab **=** tab;

**if** (tab **===** 'users') {

      this.loadAllUsers();

    } **else** {

      this.loadAdminList();

    }

  }

  loadAllUsers(): void {

    this.isLoadingUsers **=** true;

    this.authService.getAllUsers().subscribe({

      next: (users) **=>** {

        this.allUsers **=** users;

        this.filteredUsers **=** [**...**users]; // Initial list has all users

        this.isLoadingUsers **=** false;

      },

      error: (error) **=>** {

        console.error('Error loading users:', error);

        this.notificationService.error('Failed to load users', 'Error');

        this.isLoadingUsers **=** false;

      }

    });

  }

  loadAdminList(): void {

    this.isLoadingAdmins **=** true;

    this.authService.getAdminUsers().subscribe({

      next: (admins) **=>** {

        this.adminList **=** admins;

        this.isLoadingAdmins **=** false;

      },

      error: (error) **=>** {

        console.error('Error loading admins:', error);

        this.notificationService.error('Failed to load administrators', 'Error');

        this.isLoadingAdmins **=** false;

      }

    });

  }

  filterUsers(searchTerm: string): void {

**if** (**!**searchTerm **||** searchTerm.trim() **===** '') {

      this.filteredUsers **=** [**...**this.allUsers];

**return**;

    }

    searchTerm **=** searchTerm.toLowerCase().trim();

    this.filteredUsers **=** this.allUsers.filter(user **=>** {

**const** fullName **=** `${user.firstName} ${user.lastName}`.toLowerCase();

**return** user.email.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm) **||** fullName.includes(searchTerm);

    });

  }

  isUserAdmin(user: User): boolean {

**if** (Array.isArray(user.roles)) {

**return** user.roles.some(role **=>** role.toLowerCase() **===** 'admin');

    } **else** **if** (**typeof** user.roles **===** 'string') {

**return** user.roles.toLowerCase().includes('admin');

    }

**return** false;

  }

  confirmPromoteToAdmin(user: User): void {

    this.notificationService.confirm(

      `Are you sure you want to promote ${user.firstName} ${user.lastName} (${user.email}) to administrator?`,

      'Confirm Admin Promotion'

    ).then(confirmed **=>** {

**if** (confirmed) {

        this.promoteUserToAdmin(user);

      }

    });

  }

  promoteUserToAdmin(user: User): void {

    this.processingUserId **=** user.id;

    this.errorMessage **=** '';

    this.authService.promoteUserToAdmin(user.email).subscribe({

      next: () **=>** {

        this.notificationService.success('User successfully promoted to administrator!', 'Success');

        this.processingUserId **=** null;

        this.loadAllUsers(); // Refresh user list

        this.loadAdminList(); // Refresh admin list

      },

      error: (error) **=>** {

        console.error('Error promoting user to admin:', error);

        this.errorMessage **=** error?.message **||** 'Failed to promote user. An unexpected error occurred.';

        this.processingUserId **=** null;

      }

    });

  }

  confirmRemoveAdmin(admin: User | AdminUser): void {

**const** fullName **=** admin.fullName **||** `${admin.firstName} ${admin.lastName}`;

    this.notificationService.confirm(

      `Are you sure you want to remove ${fullName} as an administrator?`,

      'Confirm Removal'

    ).then(confirmed **=>** {

**if** (confirmed) {

        this.removeAdmin(admin.id);

      }

    });

  }

  removeAdmin(adminId: string): void {

    this.processingUserId **=** adminId;

    this.authService.removeAdminUser(adminId).subscribe({

      next: () **=>** {

        this.notificationService.success('Administrator successfully removed', 'Success');

        this.processingUserId **=** null;

        this.loadAllUsers(); // Refresh user list

        this.loadAdminList(); // Refresh admin list

      },

      error: (error) **=>** {

        console.error('Error removing admin:', error);

        this.notificationService.error('Failed to remove administrator', 'Error');

        this.processingUserId **=** null;

      }

    });

  }

**get** searchTerm() { **return** this.searchForm.get('searchTerm'); }

}

Admin-orders.ts

**import** { Component, OnInit, OnDestroy } **from** '@angular/core';

**import** { Subscription } **from** 'rxjs';

**import** { OrderService } **from** '../../../services/order.service';

**import** { NotificationService } **from** '../../../services/notification.service';

**import** { AuthService } **from** '../../../services/auth.service';

**import** { Router } **from** '@angular/router';

**import** { FormBuilder, FormGroup } **from** '@angular/forms';

**import** { debounceTime, distinctUntilChanged } **from** 'rxjs/operators';

**interface** Order {

  id: string;

  orderNumber: string;

  status: 'delivered' | 'pending' | 'shipped' | 'cancelled';

  totalAmount: number;

  orderDate?: Date;

  createdAt: Date;

  items?: OrderItem[];

  user?: {

    id: string;

    email: string;

    name?: string;

    phone?: string;

  };

}

**interface** OrderItem {

  id?: string;

  title: string;

  quantity: number;

  price: number;

}

@Component({

  selector: 'app-admin-orders',

  templateUrl: './admin-orders.component.html',

  styleUrls: ['./admin-orders.component.css']

})

**export** **class** AdminOrdersComponent **implements** OnInit, OnDestroy {

  orders: Order[] **=** [];

  filteredOrders: Order[] **=** []; // For displaying filtered results

  allOrders: Order[] **=** []; // Store all orders for filtering

  isLoading: boolean **=** true;

  selectedOrderDetails: Order | null **=** null;

**private** subscription: Subscription **=** **new** Subscription();

  // Add filter form

  filterForm: FormGroup;

  // Add sort options

  sortOptions **=** [

    { value: 'date-desc', label: 'Найновіші спочатку' },

    { value: 'date-asc', label: 'Найстаріші спочатку' },

    { value: 'amount-desc', label: 'За сумою (спадання)' },

    { value: 'amount-asc', label: 'За сумою (зростання)' }

  ];

  statusOptions **=** [

    { value: 'pending', label: 'Очікується' },

    { value: 'shipped', label: 'Відправлено' },

    { value: 'delivered', label: 'Доставлено' },

    { value: 'cancelled', label: 'Скасовано' }

  ];

**constructor**(

**private** orderService: OrderService,

**private** notificationService: NotificationService,

**private** authService: AuthService,

**private** router: Router,

**private** fb: FormBuilder

  ) {

    // Initialize filter form

    this.filterForm **=** this.fb.group({

      searchTerm: [''],

      status: [''],

      sortBy: ['date-desc']

    });

  }

  ngOnInit(): void {

    // Check if user is admin, if not redirect to home

**if** (**!**this.authService.isAdmin) {

      this.router.navigate(['/']);

      this.notificationService.error('Доступ заборонено');

**return**;

    }

    // Set up filter form subscription

    this.subscription.add(

      this.filterForm.valueChanges

        .pipe(

          debounceTime(300),

          distinctUntilChanged((prev, curr) **=>** JSON.stringify(prev) **===** JSON.stringify(curr))

        )

        .subscribe(() **=>** this.applyFilters())

    );

    this.loadAllOrders();

  }

  ngOnDestroy(): void {

    this.subscription.unsubscribe();

  }

  loadAllOrders(): void {

    this.isLoading **=** true;

    this.orderService.getAllOrders().subscribe({

      next: (data) **=>** {

        this.allOrders **=** this.processOrders(data);

        // Apply initial filtering and sorting

        this.applyFilters();

        this.isLoading **=** false;

      },

      error: (error) **=>** {

        console.error('Помилка при завантаженні замовлень', error);

        this.isLoading **=** false;

        this.notificationService.error('Не вдалося завантажити замовлення');

      }

    });

  }

  processOrders(orders: any[]): Order[] {

**return** orders.map(order **=>** {

      // Process each item to ensure valid price and quantity

**const** processedItems **=** order.items?.map((item: any) **=>** ({

**...**item,

        title: item.title **||** item.bookTitle **||** 'Книга без назви',

        price: **typeof** item.price **===** 'string' **?** parseFloat(item.price.replace(',', '.')) **:** Number(item.price) **||** 0,

        quantity: **typeof** item.quantity **===** 'string' **?** parseInt(item.quantity) **:** Number(item.quantity) **||** 1

      })) **||** [];

      // Calculate total amount if it's not provided or is zero

**let** totalAmount **=** **typeof** order.totalAmount **===** 'string'

**?** parseFloat(order.totalAmount.replace(',', '.'))

**:** Number(order.totalAmount);

**if** (**!**totalAmount **||** totalAmount **===** 0 **||** isNaN(totalAmount)) {

        totalAmount **=** processedItems.reduce(

          (sum: number, item: OrderItem) **=>** sum **+** (item.price **\*** item.quantity),

          0

        );

      }

      // Ensure proper date handling

**let** orderDate **=** order.createdAt;

**try** {

        orderDate **=** order.createdAt **?** **new** Date(order.createdAt) **:** **new** Date();

      } **catch** (e) {

        console.warn('Error parsing date, using current date', e);

        orderDate **=** **new** Date();

      }

      // Ensure proper ID handling - crucial for status updates

**const** id **=** order.id **||** order.orderId **||** '';

**if** (**!**id) {

        console.warn('Order without ID detected:', order);

      }

      // Ensure user data is always present

**const** user **=** order.user **||** {};

**return** {

**...**order,

        id: id, // Ensure ID is properly assigned

        orderNumber: order.orderNumber **||** id **||** 'Невідомо',

        items: processedItems,

        totalAmount: Number(totalAmount.toFixed(2)) **||** 0,

        createdAt: orderDate,

        user: {

          id: user.id **||** 'unknown',

          email: user.email **||** 'Невідомо',

          name: user.name **||** 'Не вказано',

          phone: user.phone **||** 'Не вказано'

        }

      };

    });

  }

  viewOrderDetails(order: Order): void {

    // Create a deep copy of the order to avoid changing the original

**const** processedOrder **=** {**...**order};

    // Process items to ensure proper price formatting

**if** (processedOrder.items **&&** processedOrder.items.length **>** 0) {

      processedOrder.items **=** processedOrder.items.map(item **=>** {

        // Ensure price is a proper number

**const** price **=** **typeof** item.price **===** 'string' **?** parseFloat(item.price) **:** Number(item.price) **||** 0;

        // Ensure quantity is a proper number

**const** quantity **=** **typeof** item.quantity **===** 'string' **?** parseInt(item.quantity) **:** Number(item.quantity) **||** 1;

**return** {

**...**item,

          price: price,

          quantity: quantity

        };

      });

      // Recalculate total if needed based on items

**if** (**!**processedOrder.totalAmount **||** processedOrder.totalAmount **===** 0) {

        processedOrder.totalAmount **=** processedOrder.items.reduce(

          (sum, item) **=>** sum **+** (item.price **\*** item.quantity), 0

        );

      }

    }

    this.selectedOrderDetails **=** processedOrder;

    // Log to console to help debug

    console.log('Selected order details:', this.selectedOrderDetails);

  }

  closeOrderDetails(): void {

    this.selectedOrderDetails **=** null;

  }

  closeOrderDetailsModal(event: Event): void {

**if** (event.target **===** event.currentTarget) {

      this.closeOrderDetails();

    }

  }

  getStatusClass(status: string): string {

**switch** (status?.toLowerCase()) {

**case** 'delivered': **return** 'status-delivered';

**case** 'pending': **return** 'status-pending';

**case** 'shipped': **return** 'status-shipped';

**case** 'cancelled': **return** 'status-cancelled';

**default**: **return** 'status-pending';

    }

  }

  getTranslatedStatus(status: string): string {

**switch** (status?.toLowerCase()) {

**case** 'delivered': **return** 'Доставлено';

**case** 'pending': **return** 'Очікується';

**case** 'shipped': **return** 'Відправлено';

**case** 'cancelled': **return** 'Скасовано';

**default**: **return** status **||** 'Очікується';

    }

  }

  applyFilters(): void {

**const** { searchTerm, status, sortBy } **=** this.filterForm.value;

**let** filtered **=** [**...**this.allOrders];

    // Filter by search term (order number, customer name, or email)

**if** (searchTerm) {

**const** term **=** searchTerm.toLowerCase().trim();

      filtered **=** filtered.filter(order **=>**

        order.orderNumber?.toLowerCase().includes(term) **||**

        order.id?.toLowerCase().includes(term) **||**

        order.user?.name?.toLowerCase().includes(term) **||**

        order.user?.email?.toLowerCase().includes(term)

      );

    }

    // Filter by status

**if** (status) {

      filtered **=** filtered.filter(order **=>** order.status **===** status);

    }

    // Apply sorting

**if** (sortBy) {

**switch** (sortBy) {

**case** 'date-desc':

          filtered.sort((a, b) **=>** **new** Date(b.createdAt).getTime() **-** **new** Date(a.createdAt).getTime());

**break**;

**case** 'date-asc':

          filtered.sort((a, b) **=>** **new** Date(a.createdAt).getTime() **-** **new** Date(b.createdAt).getTime());

**break**;

**case** 'amount-desc':

          filtered.sort((a, b) **=>** b.totalAmount **-** a.totalAmount);

**break**;

**case** 'amount-asc':

          filtered.sort((a, b) **=>** a.totalAmount **-** b.totalAmount);

**break**;

      }

    }

    this.filteredOrders **=** filtered;

  }

  resetFilters(): void {

    this.filterForm.patchValue({

      searchTerm: '',

      status: '',

      sortBy: 'date-desc'

    });

  }

  // Added missing method to get select value from event

  getSelectValue(event: Event): string {

**return** (event.target **as** HTMLSelectElement).value;

  }

  // Added missing method to calculate item total

  calculateItemTotal(price: number, quantity: number): number {

**return** price **\*** quantity;

  }

  // Enhanced status update with validation to prevent undefined order IDs

  updateOrderStatus(orderId: string | undefined, newStatus: string): void {

    // Validate orderId to prevent undefined values

**if** (**!**orderId) {

      console.error('Cannot update order status: Order ID is undefined');

      this.notificationService.error('Помилка: ID замовлення відсутній');

**return**;

    }

    // Add confirmation before updating status

**const** confirmMessage **=** `Ви впевнені, що хочете змінити статус замовлення на "${this.getTranslatedStatus(newStatus)}"?`;

    this.notificationService.confirm(confirmMessage, 'Підтвердження').then((confirmed: boolean) **=>** {

**if** (confirmed) {

        this.orderService.updateOrderStatus(orderId, newStatus).subscribe({

          next: () **=>** {

            // Update both allOrders and filteredOrders arrays

            [this.allOrders, this.filteredOrders].forEach(orderArray **=>** {

**const** orderIndex **=** orderArray.findIndex(order **=>** order.id **===** orderId);

**if** (orderIndex **!==** **-**1) {

                orderArray[orderIndex].status **=** newStatus **as** any;

              }

            });

            // Update selected order details if open

**if** (this.selectedOrderDetails?.id **===** orderId) {

              this.selectedOrderDetails.status **=** newStatus **as** any;

            }

            this.notificationService.success(`Статус замовлення оновлено до "${this.getTranslatedStatus(newStatus)}"`);

          },

          error: (error) **=>** {

            console.error('Помилка оновлення статусу:', error);

            this.notificationService.error('Не вдалося оновити статус замовлення');

          }

        });

      }

    });

  }

}

Author-details.component.ts

**import** { Component, OnInit, OnDestroy } **from** '@angular/core';

**import** { ActivatedRoute, Router } **from** '@angular/router';

**import** { BookService } **from** '../../services/book.service';

**import** { Title } **from** '@angular/platform-browser';

**import** { Subscription } **from** 'rxjs';

**import** { NotificationService } **from** '../../services/notification.service';

**interface** Author {

  id: number;

  name: string;

  birthDate: string | null;

  dateOfBirth?: string | null; // Add this property as optional

  biography: string | null;

  books?: any[];

}

@Component({

  selector: 'app-author-details',

  templateUrl: './author-details.component.html',

  styleUrls: ['./author-details.component.css']

})

**export** **class** AuthorDetailsComponent **implements** OnInit, OnDestroy {

  author: Author | null **=** null;

  authorBooks: any[] **=** [];

  isLoading **=** true;

  errorMessage **=** '';

**private** subscriptions: Subscription[] **=** [];

**constructor**(

**private** route: ActivatedRoute,

**public** router: Router, // Changed to public

**private** bookService: BookService,

**private** titleService: Title,

**private** notificationService: NotificationService

  ) {}

  ngOnInit(): void {

    this.loadAuthorDetails();

  }

  ngOnDestroy(): void {

    this.subscriptions.forEach(sub **=>** sub.unsubscribe());

  }

  loadAuthorDetails(): void {

**const** authorId **=** this.route.snapshot.paramMap.get('id');

**if** (**!**authorId) {

      this.errorMessage **=** 'Автора не знайдено';

      this.isLoading **=** false;

**return**;

    }

    this.isLoading **=** true;

    // Get author details

**const** authorSub **=** this.bookService.getAuthorById(**+**authorId).subscribe({

      next: (authorData) **=>** {

        console.log('Author data from API:', authorData);

        // Map the response to match our interface

        this.author **=** {

          id: authorData.id,

          name: authorData.name **||** authorData.Name **||** '',

          // Check different field name variations

          birthDate: authorData.birthDate **||** authorData.dateOfBirth **||** authorData.DateOfBirth **||** null,

          biography: authorData.biography **||** authorData.Biography **||** null,

          books: authorData.books **||** [] // Store books from author data

        };

        this.titleService.setTitle(`${this.author.name} | Книгарня`);

        // Use the books array directly from the author response

        this.authorBooks **=** this.author.books **||** [];

        this.isLoading **=** false;

      },

      error: (error) **=>** {

        console.error('Error fetching author details:', error);

        this.errorMessage **=** 'Не вдалося завантажити інформацію про автора';

        this.isLoading **=** false;

        this.notificationService.error('Помилка завантаження інформації про автора');

      }

    });

    this.subscriptions.push(authorSub);

  }

  loadAuthorBooks(authorId: number): void {

**const** booksSub **=** this.bookService.getBooksByAuthorId(authorId).subscribe({

      next: (response: any) **=>** {

        console.log('Author books response:', response);

        // Extract books from the response

**let** books: any[] **=** [];

**if** (response **&&** **typeof** response **===** 'object') {

**if** (Array.isArray(response)) {

            books **=** response;

          } **else** **if** ('books' **in** response) {

            books **=** response.books;

          } **else** **if** ('data' **in** response) {

            books **=** response.data;

          } **else** **if** ('items' **in** response) {

            books **=** response.items;

          }

        }

        // Filter books to ensure only those with this author ID are included

        this.authorBooks **=** books.filter(book **=>** {

          // Check if book has authors array

**if** (book.authors **&&** Array.isArray(book.authors)) {

            // Check if any author in the array has matching ID

**return** book.authors.some((author: { id: number } | number) **=>** {

              // If author is an object with id property

**if** (**typeof** author **===** 'object' **&&** author **!==** null **&&** 'id' **in** author) {

**return** author.id **===** authorId;

              }

              // If author is just an ID number

**if** (**typeof** author **===** 'number') {

**return** author **===** authorId;

              }

**return** false;

            });

          }

**return** false; // Exclude book if we can't verify author

        });

        console.log('Filtered author books:', this.authorBooks);

        this.isLoading **=** false;

      },

      error: (error) **=>** {

        console.error('Error fetching author books:', error);

        this.errorMessage **=** 'Не вдалося завантажити книги автора';

        this.isLoading **=** false;

        this.notificationService.error('Помилка завантаження книг автора');

      }

    });

    this.subscriptions.push(booksSub);

  }

  viewBookDetails(bookId: number): void {

    this.router.navigate(['/books', bookId]);

  }

  goToBooks(): void {

    this.router.navigate(['/books']);

  }

  formatDate(dateString: string | null): string {

**if** (**!**dateString) **return** 'Невідомо';

**const** date **=** **new** Date(dateString);

**return** date.toLocaleDateString('uk-UA', {

      year: 'numeric',

      month: 'long',

      day: 'numeric'

    });

  }

  // Add this method to handle image errors

  onImageError(event: Event): void {

**const** img **=** event.target **as** HTMLImageElement;

    img.src **=** 'assets/default-book-cover.png';

  }

}

Book.component.ts

// src/app/components/book/book.component.ts

**import** { Component, OnInit, OnDestroy } **from** '@angular/core';

**import** { ActivatedRoute, Router } **from** '@angular/router';

**import** { Subscription, Subject } **from** 'rxjs';

**import** { takeUntil } **from** 'rxjs/operators';

**import** { BookService } **from** '../../services/book.service';

**import** { CartService } **from** '../../services/cart.service';

**import** { WishlistService } **from** '../../services/wishlist.service';

**import** { NotificationService } **from** '../../services/notification.service';

**import** { AuthService } **from** '../../services/auth.service';

**import** { Book } **from** '../../models/book.model';

**import** { BookFilter } **from** '../../models/book-filter.model';

**import** { AuthorSummaryDto } **from** '../../models/author.model';

@Component({

  selector: 'app-book',

  templateUrl: './book.component.html',

  styleUrls: ['./book.component.css']

})

**export** **class** BookComponent **implements** OnInit, OnDestroy {

  books: Book[] **=** [];

  allBooks: Book[] **=** []; // To store all books before pagination

  isLoadingBooks **=** false;

**private** subscriptions: Subscription[] **=** [];

**private** destroy$ **=** **new** Subject<void>();

  isAuth **=** false;

  showCheckoutNotification **=** false;

  addedBookTitle **=** '';

  currentFilter: BookFilter **=** {};

  currentPage: number **=** 1;

  pageSize: number **=** 12;

  totalItems: number **=** 0;

**constructor**(

**private** bookService: BookService,

**private** cartService: CartService,

**private** wishlistService: WishlistService,

**private** notificationService: NotificationService,

**public** authService: AuthService,

**private** router: Router,

**private** route: ActivatedRoute

  ) { }

  ngOnInit(): void {

    this.route.queryParams.subscribe(params **=>** {

      this.currentPage **=** params['page'] **?** parseInt(params['page'], 10) **:** 1;

      this.pageSize **=** 16;

      this.loadBooks();

    });

    this.subscriptions.push(

      this.authService.isAuth$.subscribe(isAuthenticated **=>** {

        this.isAuth **=** isAuthenticated;

**if** (isAuthenticated) {

          this.loadWishlistStatuses();

        }

      })

    );

    this.wishlistService.wishlistItemIds$

      .pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$))

      .subscribe(wishlistIds **=>** {

**if** (Array.isArray(this.books)) {

          this.books.forEach(book **=>** {

            book.isInWishlist **=** wishlistIds.includes(book.id);

          });

        }

      });

  }

  loadBooks(): void {

    this.isLoadingBooks **=** true;

**const** paginationParams **=** {

**...**this.currentFilter,

      pageNumber: this.currentPage,

      pageSize: 16

    };

    this.bookService.getAllBooks(paginationParams).subscribe(

      (response: any) **=>** {

        this.books **=** response.data **||** response.items **||** response.books **||** [];

        this.totalItems **=** response.totalCount **||** response.total **||** 0;

        this.isLoadingBooks **=** false;

**if** (this.isAuth) {

          this.loadWishlistStatuses();

        }

      },

      (error: any) **=>** {

        console.error('Error fetching books:', error);

        this.notificationService.error('Не вдалося завантажити книги', 'Помилка');

        this.isLoadingBooks **=** false;

      }

    );

  }

  paginateBooks(): void {

**const** startIndex **=** (this.currentPage **-** 1) **\*** this.pageSize;

**const** endIndex **=** startIndex **+** this.pageSize;

    this.books **=** this.allBooks.slice(startIndex, endIndex);

  }

  onPageChange(page: number): void {

    this.currentPage **=** page;

    this.router.navigate([], {

      relativeTo: this.route,

      queryParams: { page },

      queryParamsHandling: 'merge'

    });

  }

  loadWishlistStatuses(): void {

    this.subscriptions.push(

      this.wishlistService.getWishlistItems().subscribe({

        next: (wishlistItems) **=>** {

**if** (Array.isArray(this.books) **&&** this.books.length **>** 0) {

**const** wishlistBookIds **=** wishlistItems.map(item **=>** item.bookId);

            this.books.forEach(book **=>** {

              book.isInWishlist **=** wishlistBookIds.includes(book.id);

            });

          }

        },

        error: (error) **=>** {

          console.error('Error loading wishlist:', error);

        }

      })

    );

  }

  onAddToCart(book: Book, event: MouseEvent): void {

    event.stopPropagation();

**try** {

      this.cartService.addItem(book);

      this.addedBookTitle **=** book.title;

      this.showCheckoutNotificationTemporarily();

    } **catch** (error: any) {

      console.error('Error adding to cart:', error);

      this.notificationService.error('Failed to add item to cart');

    }

  }

  showCheckoutNotificationTemporarily(): void {

    this.showCheckoutNotification **=** true;

    setTimeout(() **=>** {

      this.showCheckoutNotification **=** false;

    }, 4000);

  }

  goToCheckout(): void {

    this.showCheckoutNotification **=** false;

    this.router.navigate(['/cart']);

  }

  toggleWishlist(book: Book, event: MouseEvent): void {

    event.stopPropagation();

**if** (book.isInWishlist) {

      this.wishlistService.removeFromWishlist(book.id, book.title).subscribe({

        next: (response) **=>** {

**if** (response.success) {

            book.isInWishlist **=** false;

          }

        },

        error: (error) **=>** {

          console.error('Error removing from wishlist:', error);

          this.notificationService.error('Не вдалося видалити з бажаного списку', 'Помилка');

        }

      });

    } **else** {

      this.wishlistService.addToWishlist(book.id, book.title).subscribe({

        next: (response) **=>** {

**if** (response.success) {

            book.isInWishlist **=** true;

          }

        },

        error: (error) **=>** {

          console.error('Error adding to wishlist:', error);

          this.notificationService.error('Не вдалося додати до бажаного списку', 'Помилка');

        }

      });

    }

  }

  viewBookDetails(bookId: number): void {

**if** (bookId) {

      this.router.navigate(['/books', bookId]);

    }

  }

  handleImageError(event: any): void {

    event.target.src **=** 'assets/default-book-cover.png';

  }

  navigateToAuthor(author: any, event: Event): void {

    event.stopPropagation();

**if** (**typeof** author **===** 'object' **&&** author **!==** null) {

**if** (author.id) {

        this.router.navigate(['/author', author.id]);

**return**;

      }

**if** (author.name) {

        this.router.navigate(['/search'], { queryParams: { author: author.name } });

**return**;

      }

    }

**const** authorName **=** **typeof** author **===** 'string' **?** author **:** '';

**if** (authorName) {

**const** cleanName **=** authorName.split(':')[0];

      this.router.navigate(['/search'], { queryParams: { author: cleanName } });

    }

  }

  navigateToGenre(genre: any, event: Event): void {

    event.stopPropagation();

**if** (**typeof** genre **===** 'object' **&&** genre **!==** null **&&** genre.id) {

      this.router.navigate(['/genre', genre.id]);

**return**;

    }

**const** genreName **=** **typeof** genre **===** 'string' **?** genre **:** '';

**if** (genreName) {

      this.router.navigate(['/genre', encodeURIComponent(genreName)]);

    }

  }

  applyFilters(filter: BookFilter): void {

    this.currentFilter **=** filter;

    this.loadBooks();

  }

  getReviewWord(count: number): string {

**if** (count **%** 10 **===** 1 **&&** count **%** 100 **!==** 11) {

**return** 'відгук';

    } **else** **if** ([2, 3, 4].includes(count **%** 10) **&&** **!**[12, 13, 14].includes(count **%** 100)) {

**return** 'відгуки';

    } **else** {

**return** 'відгуків';

    }

  }

  isAuthorObject(author: any): author **is** AuthorSummaryDto {

**return** **typeof** author **===** 'object' **&&** author **!==** null **&&** 'name' **in** author;

  }

  ngOnDestroy(): void {

    this.destroy$.next();

    this.destroy$.complete();

    this.subscriptions.forEach(sub **=>** sub.unsubscribe());

  }

}

Book-details.component.ts

// src/app/components/book-details/book-details.component.ts

**import** { Component, OnInit, OnDestroy } **from** '@angular/core';

**import** { ActivatedRoute, Router } **from** '@angular/router';

**import** { FormBuilder, FormGroup, Validators } **from** '@angular/forms';

**import** { trigger, state, style, transition, animate } **from** '@angular/animations';

**import** { AuthService } **from** '../../services/auth.service';

**import** { BookService } **from** '../../services/book.service';

**import** { ReviewService } **from** '../../services/review.service';

**import** { CartService } **from** '../../services/cart.service';

**import** { WishlistService } **from** '../../services/wishlist.service';

**import** { NotificationService } **from** '../../services/notification.service';

**import** { Book } **from** '../../models/book.model';

**import** { Review } **from** '../../models/review.model';

**import** { BookAuthor } **from** '../../models/book-author.model';

**import** { Subject, Subscription } **from** 'rxjs';

**import** { takeUntil } **from** 'rxjs/operators';

**import** { Author, AuthorSummaryDto } **from** '../../models/author.model';

@Component({

  selector: 'app-book-details',

  templateUrl: './book-details.component.html',

  styleUrls: ['./book-details.component.css'],

  animations: [

    trigger('slideInOut', [

      state('in', style({transform: 'translateX(0)'})),

      transition('void => \*', [

        style({transform: 'translateX(100%)'}),

        animate(300)

      ]),

      transition('\* => void', [

        animate(300, style({transform: 'translateX(100%)'}))

      ])

    ])

  ]

})

**export** **class** BookDetailsComponent **implements** OnInit, OnDestroy {

  book: Book | null **=** null;

  isLoading **=** true;

  // Властивості для відгуків

  reviews: Review[] **=** [];

  averageRating **=** 0;

  reviewForm**!**: FormGroup;

  showReviewForm **=** false;

  canUserReview **=** false;

  isSubmittingReview **=** false;

  reviewError: string | null **=** null;

  selectedRating **=** 0;

  addedBookTitle: string **=** ''; // Для відображення назви книги в сповіщенні про додавання до кошика

  // Властивості для кошика та сповіщень

  isAddingToCart **=** false;

  showCheckoutNotification **=** false;

  // Додаємо нову властивість

  hasUserReview **=** false;

**private** destroy$ **=** **new** Subject<void>();

**constructor**(

**private** route: ActivatedRoute,

**private** router: Router,

**private** bookService: BookService,

**public** authService: AuthService,

**private** reviewService: ReviewService,

**private** cartService: CartService,

**private** wishlistService: WishlistService,

**private** notificationService: NotificationService,

**private** fb: FormBuilder

  ) {}

  ngOnInit(): void {

    // Uncomment this line to force clear review status on every page load

    this.clearReviewStatus();

    this.loadBookDetails();

    this.initReviewForm();

  }

  initReviewForm(): void {

    this.reviewForm **=** this.fb.group({

      rating: [0, [Validators.required, Validators.min(1)]],

      comment: ['', [Validators.required, Validators.minLength(10)]]

    });

  }

  loadBookDetails(): void {

**const** bookId **=** Number(this.route.snapshot.paramMap.get('id'));

**if** (**!**bookId) {

      this.isLoading **=** false;

      this.notificationService.error('Book ID not found.');

      this.router.navigate(['/books']);

**return**;

    }

    // Reset review state

    this.reviews **=** [];

    this.canUserReview **=** false; // Start with false and only enable after proper check

    this.bookService.getBookById(bookId).subscribe({

      next: (book: Book) **=>** {

        this.book **=** book;

        this.loadReviews(bookId, true);

        this.checkUserReviewStatus(); // Separate check from loadReviews

        this.checkWishlistStatus();

        this.isLoading **=** false;

      },

      error: (error: any) **=>** {

        console.error('Error loading book details:', error);

        this.notificationService.error('Failed to load book details');

        this.isLoading **=** false;

      }

    });

  }

  loadReviews(bookId: number, forceRefresh **=** false): void {

    // Remove direct access to private API\_URL property

    this.reviewService.getReviewsForBook(bookId, forceRefresh).subscribe({

      next: (reviews) **=>** {

        console.log('Raw reviews data:', reviews);

        // Always initialize as empty array

        this.reviews **=** [];

**if** (reviews **&&** reviews.length **>** 0) {

          // Map the API response format to our Review model

          this.reviews **=** reviews.map(review **=>** {

            // Log each review for debugging

            console.log(`Review:`, review);

**return** {

              id: review.id **||** 0,

              bookId: bookId,

              userId: review.userId **||** '',

              username: review.userName **||** 'Анонімний користувач',

              rating: review.stars **||** 0,

              comment: review.review **||** 'Немає коментаря',

              createdAt: review.createdAt **?** **new** Date(review.createdAt) **:** **new** Date()

            };

          });

        }

        console.log('Processed reviews:', this.reviews);

        this.calculateAverageRating();

        this.checkUserReviewStatus();

      },

      error: (error) **=>** {

        console.error('Error loading reviews:', error);

        this.reviews **=** [];

        this.averageRating **=** 0;

        // Force allow reviewing if there was an error loading reviews

        this.canUserReview **=** this.authService.currentUserValue **!=** null;

      }

    });

  }

  checkWishlistStatus(): void {

**if** (this.book) {

      this.wishlistService.isInWishlist$(this.book.id)

        .pipe(takeUntil(this.destroy$))

        .subscribe(isInWishlist **=>** {

**if** (this.book) {

            this.book.isInWishlist **=** isInWishlist;

          }

        });

    }

  }

  ngOnDestroy(): void {

    this.destroy$.next();

    this.destroy$.complete();

  }

  calculateAverageRating(): void {

**if** (this.reviews **&&** this.reviews.length **>** 0) {

**const** total **=** this.reviews.reduce((acc, review) **=>** acc **+** (review.rating **||** 0), 0);

      this.averageRating **=** total **/** this.reviews.length;

      // Round to 1 decimal place for display purposes

      this.averageRating **=** Math.round(this.averageRating **\*** 10) **/** 10;

      console.log('Calculated average rating:', this.averageRating);

    } **else** {

      this.averageRating **=** 0;

    }

  }

  // Виправлений метод перевірки статусу відгуку користувача

  checkUserReviewStatus(): void {

**const** currentUser **=** this.authService.currentUserValue;

    // За замовчуванням користувач не може залишити відгук, якщо не авторизований

**if** (**!**currentUser) {

      console.log('No user logged in, cannot review');

      this.canUserReview **=** false;

      this.hasUserReview **=** false;

**return**;

    }

    console.log('Current user ID:', currentUser.id **?** currentUser.id **:** 'EMPTY ID');

    // Якщо книга завантажена

**if** (this.book) {

      // За замовчуванням дозволяємо писати відгуки авторизованим користувачам

      this.canUserReview **=** true;

      this.hasUserReview **=** false;

      // Пряма перевірка у списку завантажених відгуків

**if** (this.reviews **&&** this.reviews.length **>** 0) {

        // Перевіряємо, чи користувач вже залишив відгук

        // Але ТІЛЬКИ якщо у нього є ID

**if** (currentUser.id) {

**const** userReview **=** this.reviews.find(review **=>** {

**if** (**!**review.userId **||** **!**currentUser.id) {

**return** false; // Якщо хоча б один ID порожній, це не збіг

            }

            console.log(`Comparing review userId: "${review.userId}" with current userId: "${currentUser.id}"`);

**return** String(review.userId) **===** String(currentUser.id);

          });

**if** (userReview) {

            console.log('Found user review directly in loaded reviews:', userReview);

            this.hasUserReview **=** true;

            this.canUserReview **=** false;

**return**;

          }

        }

      }

      // Якщо користувач не має ID, не робимо додаткову перевірку API

**if** (**!**currentUser.id) {

        console.log('Skipping API check because user has no ID');

        this.canUserReview **=** true;

        this.hasUserReview **=** false;

**return**;

      }

      // Якщо не знайшли відгук у завантажених даних, запитуємо API

      this.reviewService.hasUserReviewedBook(this.book.id).subscribe({

        next: (hasReviewed) **=>** {

          this.canUserReview **=** **!**hasReviewed;

          this.hasUserReview **=** hasReviewed;

          console.log(`API check: User ${currentUser.id} has reviewed? ${hasReviewed}, canReview: ${this.canUserReview}`);

        },

        error: (error) **=>** {

          console.error('Error checking if user has reviewed:', error);

          this.canUserReview **=** true; // При помилці краще дозволити залишити відгук

          this.hasUserReview **=** false;

        }

      });

    }

  }

  getSortedAuthors():  { author: Author, isPrimary: boolean }[]  {

**if** (**!**this.book **||** **!**this.book.bookAuthors) {

**return** [];

    }

    // Debug the author objects to see if they have IDs

    console.log('Book authors:', this.book.bookAuthors);

**return** [**...**this.book.bookAuthors].sort((a, b) **=>**

      (a.isPrimary **===** b.isPrimary) **?** 0 **:** a.isPrimary **?** **-**1 **:** 1

    );

  }

  onImageError(event: any): void {

    event.target.src **=** 'assets/default-book-cover.png';

  }

  toggleWishlist(): void {

**if** (**!**this.book) **return**;

**const** serviceCall **=** this.book.isInWishlist

**?** this.wishlistService.removeFromWishlist(this.book.id, this.book.title)

**:** this.wishlistService.addToWishlist(this.book.id, this.book.title);

    serviceCall.subscribe({

      next: (response) **=>** {

**if** (response.success **&&** this.book) {

          this.book.isInWishlist **=** **!**this.book.isInWishlist;

        }

      },

      error: (error) **=>** {

        console.error('Error toggling wishlist:', error);

        this.notificationService.error('Could not update wishlist.', 'Error');

      }

    });

  }

  onAddToCart(): void {

**if** (**!**this.book) **return**;

    this.isAddingToCart **=** true;

    this.addedBookTitle **=** this.book.title; // Зберігаємо назву книги для відображення в сповіщенні

    this.cartService.addToCart(this.book.id, 1).subscribe({

      next: () **=>** {

        this.notificationService.success(`'${this.book?.title}' added to cart!`);

        this.showCheckoutNotificationTemporarily();

        this.isAddingToCart **=** false;

      },

      error: (err) **=>** {

        this.notificationService.error(err.error?.message **||** 'Failed to add to cart.');

        this.isAddingToCart **=** false;

      }

    });

  }

  showCheckoutNotificationTemporarily(): void {

    this.showCheckoutNotification **=** true;

    setTimeout(() **=>** {

      this.showCheckoutNotification **=** false;

    }, 5000);

  }

  goToCheckout(): void {

    this.router.navigate(['/cart']);

  }

  navigateToEditBook(): void {

**if** (this.book) {

      this.router.navigate(['/books/edit', this.book.id]);

    }

  }

  // Update the navigateToAuthor method to handle the new author format

  navigateToAuthor(author: string | AuthorSummaryDto): void {

**let** authorId: number | undefined;

    // Handle the new AuthorSummaryDto format

**if** (author **&&** **typeof** author **===** 'object') {

**if** (author.id) {

        // Direct object with id property (new format)

        authorId **=** author.id;

      } **else** **if** ('author' **in** author **&&** author['author'] **&&** **typeof** author['author'] **===** 'object' **&&** 'id' **in** author['author']) {

        // Nested object format (for backwards compatibility) - using indexed access

        authorId **=** author['author']['id'] **as** number;

      }

    }

**if** (authorId) {

      this.router.navigate(['/author', authorId]);

    } **else** {

      // Fallback for string-based author names (for backwards compatibility)

**const** authorName **=** **typeof** author **===** 'string' **?** author **:** author?.name **||** '';

**if** (authorName) {

        this.router.navigate(['/search'], { queryParams: { author: authorName } });

      } **else** {

        this.notificationService.error('Неможливо відкрити сторінку автора: ID не знайдено');

      }

    }

  }

  navigateToGenre(genre: any): void {

    // Handle if genre is an object

**if** (**typeof** genre **===** 'object' **&&** genre **!==** null **&&** genre.name) {

      this.router.navigate(['/genre', encodeURIComponent(genre.name)]);

**return**;

    }

    // Handle if genre is a string

**if** (**typeof** genre **===** 'string') {

      this.router.navigate(['/genre', encodeURIComponent(genre)]);

    }

  }

  // --- Review Methods ---

  toggleReviewForm(): void {

    this.showReviewForm **=** **!**this.showReviewForm;

**if** (this.showReviewForm) {

      // Reset form when opening

      this.reviewForm.reset({rating: 0, comment: ''});

      this.selectedRating **=** 0;

      this.reviewError **=** null;

    }

  }

  setRating(rating: number): void {

    this.selectedRating **=** rating;

    this.reviewForm.get('rating')?.setValue(rating);

  }

  onSubmitReview(): void {

**if** (this.reviewForm.invalid **||** **!**this.book) {

      // Mark fields as touched to show validation errors

      Object.keys(this.reviewForm.controls).forEach(key **=>** {

        this.reviewForm.get(key)?.markAsTouched();

      });

**return**;

    }

    this.isSubmittingReview **=** true;

    this.reviewError **=** null;

    // IMPORTANT: Explicitly include user ID in review data

**const** currentUser **=** this.authService.currentUserValue;

**const** reviewData **=** {

      bookId: this.book.id,

      userId: currentUser?.id, // Explicitly include user ID

      stars: this.reviewForm.get('rating')?.value,

      review: this.reviewForm.get('comment')?.value

    };

    console.log('Submitting review with user ID:', currentUser?.id);

    this.reviewService.createReview(reviewData).subscribe({

      next: (response) **=>** {

        console.log('Review submitted successfully:', response);

        // Create a properly formatted review object to add to the list

**const** newReview **=** {

          id: response.id **||** Math.random(), // Use response ID or generate random one

          bookId: this.book**!**.id,

          userId: currentUser?.id **||** '',

          username: `${currentUser?.firstName} ${currentUser?.lastName}`,

          rating: reviewData.stars,

          comment: reviewData.review,

          createdAt: **new** Date()

        };

        // Add the new review to the top of the list

        this.reviews.unshift(newReview);

        // Update UI state

        this.calculateAverageRating();

        this.canUserReview **=** false; // Immediately disable the ability to review

        this.showReviewForm **=** false;

        this.isSubmittingReview **=** false;

        this.reviewForm.reset();

        // IMPORTANT: Store in session storage that this user has reviewed this book

**if** (this.book **&&** currentUser) {

**const** reviewKey **=** `user\_${currentUser.id}\_reviewed\_book\_${this.book.id}`;

          sessionStorage.setItem(reviewKey, 'true');

          console.log(`Updated session storage: ${reviewKey} = true`);

        }

        // Show success message

        this.notificationService.success('Ваш відгук успішно додано!');

      },

      error: (error) **=>** {

        console.error('Error submitting review:', error);

        this.reviewError **=** error.message **||** 'Помилка при надсиланні відгуку. Спробуйте пізніше.';

        this.isSubmittingReview **=** false;

      }

    });

  }

  getReviewsText(count: number): string {

**if** (count **%** 10 **===** 1 **&&** count **%** 100 **!==** 11) {

**return** 'відгук';

    } **else** **if** ([2, 3, 4].includes(count **%** 10) **&&** **!**[12, 13, 14].includes(count **%** 100)) {

**return** 'відгуки';

    } **else** {

**return** 'відгуків';

    }

  }

  confirmDeleteBook(): void {

**if** (**!**this.book) **return**;

**const** confirmMessage **=** `Ви впевнені, що хочете видалити книгу "${this.book.title}"? Цю дію неможливо скасувати.`;

    this.notificationService.confirm(confirmMessage, 'Підтвердження')

      .then(ok **=>** {

**if** (ok) {

          this.deleteBook();

        } **else** {

          this.notificationService.info('Дія скасована', 'Скасовано');

        }

      });

  }

  deleteBook(): void {

**if** (**!**this.book) **return**;

    this.isLoading **=** true;

    this.bookService.deleteBook(this.book.id).subscribe({

      next: () **=>** {

        this.notificationService.success(`Книгу "${this.book?.title}" успішно видалено`, 'Успіх');

        this.router.navigate(['/books']); // Redirect to books list

      },

      error: (error) **=>** {

        console.error('Error deleting book:', error);

        this.isLoading **=** false;

**const** errorMessage **=** error.error?.message **||** 'Виникла помилка при видаленні книги';

        this.notificationService.error(errorMessage, 'Помилка');

      }

    });

  }

  // Add this helper method

  isAuthorObject(author: any): author **is** AuthorSummaryDto {

**return** **typeof** author **===** 'object' **&&** author **!==** null **&&** 'name' **in** author;

  }

  // Add a method to be called during component initialization

  clearReviewStatus(): void {

**const** currentUser **=** this.authService.currentUserValue;

**if** (currentUser) {

**const** bookId **=** Number(this.route.snapshot.paramMap.get('id'));

**if** (bookId) {

**const** reviewKey **=** `user\_${currentUser.id}\_reviewed\_book\_${bookId}`;

        console.log('Clearing review status:', reviewKey);

        // Just remove the item rather than setting to 'false' to force a fresh check

        sessionStorage.removeItem(reviewKey);

      }

    }

  }

  // Update the navigateToPublisher method to handle publisher objects

  navigateToPublisher(publisher: any): void {

**if** (**!**publisher) **return**;

    // If we have a publisher object with ID

**if** (**typeof** publisher **===** 'object' **&&** publisher.id) {

      this.router.navigate(['/publisher', publisher.id]);

    }

    // If we have just a publisher ID and name separate

**else** **if** (this.book **&&** this.book.publisherId) {

      this.router.navigate(['/publisher', this.book.publisherId]);

    }

    // Fallback to search by name

**else** **if** (**typeof** publisher **===** 'string' **||** (publisher **&&** publisher.name)) {

**const** publisherName **=** **typeof** publisher **===** 'string' **?** publisher **:** publisher.name;

      this.router.navigate(['/search'], { queryParams: { publisher: publisherName }});

    }

  }

}

Edit-book.component.ts

// src/app/components/edit-book/edit-book.component.ts

**import** { Component, OnInit, OnDestroy, HostListener } **from** '@angular/core';

**import** { FormBuilder, FormGroup, Validators, AbstractControl, ValidationErrors, FormControl } **from** '@angular/forms';

**import** { Router, ActivatedRoute } **from** '@angular/router';

**import** { Observable, of, Subject, Subscription, forkJoin } **from** 'rxjs';

**import** { debounceTime, distinctUntilChanged, switchMap, tap, catchError, filter, take, map } **from** 'rxjs/operators';

**import** { BookService } **from** '../../services/book.service';

**import** { NotificationService } **from** '../../services/notification.service';

**import** { CreateOrUpdateBookDTO } **from** '../../models/create-update-book.dto';

**import** { Book } **from** '../../models/book.model';

**import** { Author } **from** '../../models/author.model';

**import** { Genre } **from** '../../models/genre.model';

**import** { Publisher } **from** '../../models/publisher.model';

**import** { Language } **from** '../../models/language.model';

**export** **function** publicationYearValidator(control: AbstractControl): ValidationErrors | null {

**if** (control.value) {

**const** year **=** parseInt(control.value, 10);

**const** currentYear **=** **new** Date().getFullYear();

**if** (isNaN(year) **||** year **<** 1000 **||** year **>** currentYear) {

**return** { invalidYearRange: true };

    }

  }

**return** null;

}

@Component({

  selector: 'app-edit-book',

  templateUrl: './edit-book.component.html',

  styleUrls: ['./edit-book.component.css']

})

**export** **class** EditBookComponent **implements** OnInit, OnDestroy {

  editBookForm**!**: FormGroup;

  bookId**!**: number;

  bookToEdit: Book | null **=** null;

  // Form controls as FormControl objects

  authorSearchCtrl **=** **new** FormControl('');

  genreSearchCtrl **=** **new** FormControl('');

  publisherSearchCtrl **=** **new** FormControl('');

  // Multiple selections

  selectedAuthors: Author[] **=** [];

  selectedGenres: Genre[] **=** [];

  selectedPublisher: Publisher | null **=** null;

  selectedLanguage: Language | null **=** null;

  // Search results

  authorSearchResults$: Observable<Author[]> **=** of([]);

  genreSearchResults$: Observable<Genre[]> **=** of([]);

  publisherSearchResults$: Observable<Publisher[]> **=** of([]);

  languageSearchResults$: Observable<Language[]> **=** of([]);

  // Search terms subjects

**private** authorSearchTerms **=** **new** Subject<string>();

**private** genreSearchTerms **=** **new** Subject<string>();

**private** publisherSearchTerms **=** **new** Subject<string>();

**private** languageSearchTerms **=** **new** Subject<string>();

  // Loading states

  isLoadingAuthors **=** false;

  isLoadingGenres **=** false;

  isLoadingPublishers **=** false;

  isLoadingLanguages **=** false;

  isLoadingData **=** true;

  isSubmitting **=** false;

  // Adding new entities states

  isAddingNewAuthor **=** false;

  isAddingNewGenre **=** false;

  isAddingNewPublisher **=** false;

  newAuthorName **=** '';

  newAuthorBirthDate **=** '';

  newAuthorBiography **=** '';

  newGenreName **=** '';

  newPublisherName **=** '';

  newPublisherCountry **=** '';

  newPublisherDescription **=** '';

  // Year picker

  currentYear **=** **new** Date().getFullYear();

  showYearPicker **=** false;

  yearRange **=** { start: this.currentYear **-** 19, end: this.currentYear };

  yearsToDisplay: number[] **=** [];

  // Error handling

  errorMessage: string | null **=** null;

  imageLoadError **=** false;

  // Subscriptions

**private** subscriptions: Subscription[] **=** [];

  // Reference data

  languages: Language[] **=** [];

  publishers: Publisher[] **=** [];

  // Add this property with the other state variables

  showLanguageDropdown **=** false;

  showAuthorDropdown **=** false;

  showGenreDropdown **=** false;

  showPublisherDropdown **=** false;

**constructor**(

**private** fb: FormBuilder,

**private** router: Router,

**private** route: ActivatedRoute,

**private** bookService: BookService,

**private** notificationService: NotificationService

  ) {}

  ngOnInit(): void {

    this.initForm();

    this.loadReferenceData();

    this.setupSearchObservables();

    // Get book ID from route and load book data

**const** routeSub **=** this.route.paramMap.subscribe(params **=>** {

**const** idParam **=** params.get('id');

**if** (idParam) {

        this.bookId **=** **+**idParam;

        this.loadBookData();

      } **else** {

        this.isLoadingData **=** false;

        this.errorMessage **=** "Book ID not found. Cannot edit.";

      }

    });

    this.subscriptions.push(routeSub);

    this.updateYearsToDisplay();

  }

  initForm(): void {

    this.editBookForm **=** this.fb.group({

      name: ['', Validators.required],

      price: ['', [Validators.required, Validators.pattern(/**^**\d**+**(\.\d**{1,2}**)**?$**/)]],

      numberOfPages: ['', [Validators.required, Validators.min(1), Validators.pattern("^[1-9]\\d\*$")]],

      publicationYear: ['', [Validators.required, Validators.min(1000), Validators.max(this.currentYear), publicationYearValidator]],

      isbn: ['', [Validators.required, Validators.pattern(/**^**(?=(?:\D**\***\d)**{10}**(?:(?:\D**\***\d)**{3}**)**?$**)[\d-]**+$**/)]],

      description: [''],

      image: ['', [Validators.pattern(/**^**(ftp**|**http**|**https):\/\/[**^** "]**+$**/)]],

      stockQuantity: ['', [Validators.required, Validators.min(0), Validators.pattern("^\\d+$")]]

    });

  }

  loadReferenceData(): void {

    forkJoin({

      languages: this.bookService.getLanguages(),

      publishers: this.bookService.getPublishers()

    }).subscribe({

      next: (results) **=>** {

        this.languages **=** results.languages;

        this.publishers **=** results.publishers;

      },

      error: (error) **=>** {

        console.error('Error loading reference data:', error);

        this.notificationService.error('Failed to load reference data');

      }

    });

  }

  setupSearchObservables(): void {

    // Author search

    this.authorSearchResults$ **=** this.authorSearchTerms.pipe(

      debounceTime(300),

      distinctUntilChanged(),

      filter((term: string) **=>** term.length **>** 1 **||** term.length **===** 0),

      tap(() **=>** this.isLoadingAuthors **=** true),

      switchMap((term: string) **=>** term **?** this.bookService.searchAuthors(term) **:** of([])),

      tap(() **=>** this.isLoadingAuthors **=** false),

      catchError(() **=>** { this.isLoadingAuthors **=** false; **return** of([]); })

    );

    // Genre search

    this.genreSearchResults$ **=** this.genreSearchTerms.pipe(

      debounceTime(300),

      distinctUntilChanged(),

      filter((term: string) **=>** term.length **>** 1 **||** term.length **===** 0),

      tap(() **=>** this.isLoadingGenres **=** true),

      switchMap((term: string) **=>** term **?** this.bookService.searchGenres(term) **:** of([])),

      tap(() **=>** this.isLoadingGenres **=** false),

      catchError(() **=>** { this.isLoadingGenres **=** false; **return** of([]); })

    );

    // Publisher search

    this.publisherSearchResults$ **=** this.publisherSearchTerms.pipe(

      debounceTime(300),

      distinctUntilChanged(),

      filter((term: string) **=>** term.length **>** 1 **||** term.length **===** 0),

      tap(() **=>** this.isLoadingPublishers **=** true),

      switchMap((term: string) **=>** term **?** this.bookService.searchPublishers(term) **:** of([])),

      tap(() **=>** this.isLoadingPublishers **=** false),

      catchError(() **=>** { this.isLoadingPublishers **=** false; **return** of([]); })

    );

    // Language search

    this.languageSearchResults$ **=** this.languageSearchTerms.pipe(

      debounceTime(300),

      distinctUntilChanged(),

      filter((term: string) **=>** term.length **>** 1 **||** term.length **===** 0),

      tap(() **=>** this.isLoadingLanguages **=** true),

      switchMap((term: string) **=>** {

        // Instead of using searchLanguages, filter the languages array locally

**return** this.bookService.getLanguages().pipe(

          map(languages **=>** {

**if** (**!**term) **return** languages.slice(0, 10);

**return** languages.filter(lang **=>**

              lang.name.toLowerCase().includes(term.toLowerCase())

            ).slice(0, 15);

          })

        );

      }),

      tap(() **=>** this.isLoadingLanguages **=** false),

      catchError(() **=>** {

        this.isLoadingLanguages **=** false;

**return** of([]);

      })

    );

  }

  loadBookData(): void {

    this.isLoadingData **=** true;

    this.bookService.getBookById(this.bookId).subscribe({

      next: (book) **=>** {

        this.bookToEdit **=** book;

        // Populate form with book data

        this.editBookForm.patchValue({

          name: book.title,

          price: book.price,

          numberOfPages: book.numberOfPages,

          publicationYear: book.publicationYear **||** **new** Date().getFullYear(),

          isbn: book.isbn **||** '',

          description: book.description **||** '',

          image: book.image **||** '',

          stockQuantity: book.stockQuantity **||** 0

        });

        // Set selected language - find from loaded languages

**if** (book.languageId **&&** this.languages.length **>** 0) {

**const** foundLanguage **=** this.languages.find(l **=>** l.id **===** book.languageId);

**if** (foundLanguage) {

            this.selectedLanguage **=** foundLanguage;

          }

        }

        // Set selected publisher - find from loaded publishers

**if** (book.publisherId **&&** this.publishers.length **>** 0) {

**const** foundPublisher **=** this.publishers.find(p **=>** p.id **===** book.publisherId);

**if** (foundPublisher) {

            this.selectedPublisher **=** foundPublisher;

          }

        }

        // Set selected authors

**if** (book.authors **&&** book.authors.length **>** 0) {

          // Create properly typed Author objects

          this.selectedAuthors **=** book.authors

            .filter(author **=>** author **!==** null)

            .map(author **=>** {

**if** (**typeof** author **===** 'object' **&&** author **!==** null) {

                // Ensure we create a valid Author object with required properties

**const** authorObj: Author **=** {

                  id: author.id,

                  name: author.name

                };

                // Add biography if it exists

**if** ('biography' **in** author) {

                  authorObj.biography **=** author.biography **as** string;

                }

**return** authorObj;

              } **else** **if** (**typeof** author **===** 'string') {

                // Handle string case if needed

**return** {

                  id: 0,

                  name: author

                } **as** Author;

              }

**return** null;

            })

            .filter((a): a **is** Author **=>** a **!==** null);

        }

        // Set selected genres

**if** (book.genres **&&** book.genres.length **>** 0) {

          this.selectedGenres **=** book.genres.map(genre **=>** {

**if** (**typeof** genre **===** 'object' **&&** genre **!==** null) {

**return** {

                id: genre.id,

                name: genre.name

              };

            } **else** **if** (**typeof** genre **===** 'string') {

              // Handle string case if needed

**return** { id: 0, name: genre **as** string };

            }

**return** null;

          }).filter((g): g **is** Genre **=>** g **!==** null);

        }

        this.isLoadingData **=** false;

      },

      error: (err) **=>** {

        this.isLoadingData **=** false;

        this.errorMessage **=** 'Failed to load book data. It may have been deleted.';

        this.notificationService.error(this.errorMessage **||** 'Error loading book data');

        console.error(err);

      }

    });

  }

  // Author methods

  searchAuthor(event: Event): void {

**const** term **=** (event.target **as** HTMLInputElement).value;

    this.showAuthorDropdown **=** true;

    this.authorSearchTerms.next(term);

  }

  selectAuthor(author: Author): void {

**if** (**!**this.selectedAuthors.some(a **=>** a.id **===** author.id)) {

      this.selectedAuthors.push(author);

    }

    this.authorSearchCtrl.setValue('');

    this.showAuthorDropdown **=** false;

  }

  removeAuthor(author: Author): void {

    this.selectedAuthors **=** this.selectedAuthors.filter(a **=>** a.id **!==** author.id);

  }

  startAddNewAuthor(initialName: string **=** ''): void {

    this.isAddingNewAuthor **=** true;

    this.newAuthorName **=** initialName;

    this.newAuthorBirthDate **=** '';

    this.newAuthorBiography **=** '';

  }

  confirmAddNewAuthor(): void {

**if** (**!**this.newAuthorName.trim()) **return**;

    this.bookService.createAuthor({

      name: this.newAuthorName.trim(),

      birthDate: this.newAuthorBirthDate **||** undefined,

      biography: this.newAuthorBiography.trim() **||** undefined

    }).subscribe({

      next: (newAuthor: Author) **=>** {

        this.selectedAuthors.push(newAuthor);

        this.isAddingNewAuthor **=** false;

        this.newAuthorName **=** '';

        this.newAuthorBirthDate **=** '';

        this.newAuthorBiography **=** '';

      },

      error: (error: any) **=>** {

        console.error('Error creating author:', error);

        this.notificationService.error('Failed to create author. Please try again.');

      }

    });

  }

  cancelAddNewAuthor(): void {

    this.isAddingNewAuthor **=** false;

    this.newAuthorName **=** '';

    this.newAuthorBirthDate **=** '';

    this.newAuthorBiography **=** '';

  }

  // Genre methods

  searchGenre(event: Event): void {

**const** term **=** (event.target **as** HTMLInputElement).value;

    this.showGenreDropdown **=** true;

    this.genreSearchTerms.next(term);

  }

  selectGenre(genre: Genre): void {

**if** (**!**this.selectedGenres.some(g **=>** g.id **===** genre.id)) {

      this.selectedGenres.push(genre);

    }

    this.genreSearchCtrl.setValue('');

    this.showGenreDropdown **=** false;

  }

  removeGenre(genre: Genre): void {

    this.selectedGenres **=** this.selectedGenres.filter(g **=>** g.id **!==** genre.id);

  }

  startAddNewGenre(initialName: string **=** ''): void {

    this.isAddingNewGenre **=** true;

    this.newGenreName **=** initialName;

  }

  confirmAddNewGenre(): void {

**if** (**!**this.newGenreName.trim()) **return**;

    this.bookService.addGenre({

      name: this.newGenreName.trim()

    }).subscribe({

      next: (newGenre: Genre) **=>** {

        this.selectedGenres.push(newGenre);

        this.isAddingNewGenre **=** false;

        this.newGenreName **=** '';

      },

      error: (error: any) **=>** { // Add type annotation here

        console.error('Error creating genre:', error);

        this.notificationService.error('Failed to create genre. Please try again.');

      }

    });

  }

  cancelAddNewGenre(): void {

    this.isAddingNewGenre **=** false;

    this.newGenreName **=** '';

  }

  // Publisher methods

  searchPublisher(event: Event): void {

**const** term **=** (event.target **as** HTMLInputElement).value;

    this.showPublisherDropdown **=** true;

    this.publisherSearchTerms.next(term);

  }

  selectPublisher(publisher: Publisher): void {

    this.selectedPublisher **=** publisher;

    this.publisherSearchCtrl.setValue(publisher.name);

    this.showPublisherDropdown **=** false;

  }

  startAddNewPublisher(initialName: string **=** ''): void {

    this.isAddingNewPublisher **=** true;

    this.newPublisherName **=** initialName;

    this.newPublisherCountry **=** '';

    this.newPublisherDescription **=** '';

  }

  confirmAddNewPublisher(): void {

**if** (**!**this.newPublisherName.trim()) **return**;

    this.bookService.createPublisher({

      name: this.newPublisherName.trim(),

      country: this.newPublisherCountry.trim() **||** undefined,

      description: this.newPublisherDescription.trim() **||** undefined

    }).subscribe({

      next: (newPublisher: Publisher) **=>** {

        this.selectedPublisher **=** newPublisher;

        this.isAddingNewPublisher **=** false;

        this.newPublisherName **=** '';

        this.newPublisherCountry **=** '';

        this.newPublisherDescription **=** '';

        this.publisherSearchCtrl.setValue(newPublisher.name);

      },

      error: (error) **=>** {

        console.error('Error creating publisher:', error);

        this.notificationService.error('Failed to create publisher. Please try again.');

      }

    });

  }

  cancelAddNewPublisher(): void {

    this.isAddingNewPublisher **=** false;

    this.newPublisherName **=** '';

    this.newPublisherCountry **=** '';

    this.newPublisherDescription **=** '';

  }

  // Language methods

  searchLanguage(event: Event): void {

**const** term **=** (event.target **as** HTMLInputElement).value;

    this.showLanguageDropdown **=** true;

    this.languageSearchTerms.next(term);

  }

  selectLanguage(language: Language): void {

    this.selectedLanguage **=** language;

    this.showLanguageDropdown **=** false;

    // Update input with selected language name

**const** inputElement **=** document.querySelector('.language-search-input') **as** HTMLInputElement;

**if** (inputElement) {

      inputElement.value **=** language.name;

    }

  }

  toggleLanguageDropdown(): void {

    this.showLanguageDropdown **=** **!**this.showLanguageDropdown;

  }

  closeLanguageDropdown(): void {

    this.showLanguageDropdown **=** false;

  }

  // Year picker methods

  updateYearsToDisplay(): void {

    this.yearsToDisplay **=** [];

**for** (**let** year **=** this.yearRange.start; year **<=** this.yearRange.end; year**++**) {

      this.yearsToDisplay.push(year);

    }

  }

  getYearRange(): number[] {

**return** this.yearsToDisplay;

  }

  toggleYearPicker(): void {

    this.showYearPicker **=** **!**this.showYearPicker;

**if** (this.showYearPicker) {

**const** currentValue **=** this.editBookForm.get('publicationYear')?.value;

**if** (currentValue) {

**const** year **=** parseInt(currentValue, 10);

**if** (**!**isNaN(year) **&&** year **>=** 1000) {

          // Center the year range around the selected year

          this.yearRange.start **=** Math.max(1000, year **-** 10);

          this.yearRange.end **=** Math.min(this.currentYear, this.yearRange.start **+** 19);

          this.updateYearsToDisplay();

        }

      }

    }

  }

  changeYearRange(delta: number): void {

**const** newStart **=** this.yearRange.start **+** delta **\*** 20;

**if** (newStart **>=** 1000 **&&** newStart **<=** this.currentYear) {

      this.yearRange.start **=** newStart;

      this.yearRange.end **=** Math.min(this.currentYear, this.yearRange.start **+** 19);

      this.updateYearsToDisplay();

    }

  }

  selectYear(year: number): void {

**if** (year **<=** this.currentYear) {

      this.editBookForm.patchValue({ publicationYear: year });

      this.showYearPicker **=** false;

    }

  }

  handleImageError(event: Event): void {

    this.imageLoadError **=** true;

**const** imgElement **=** event.target **as** HTMLImageElement;

    imgElement.src **=** 'assets/default-book-cover.png';

  }

  checkImageLoad(): void {

    this.imageLoadError **=** false;

  }

  onSubmit(): void {

**if** (this.editBookForm.invalid) {

      this.editBookForm.markAllAsTouched();

**return**;

    }

**if** (this.selectedAuthors.length **===** 0) {

      this.errorMessage **=** 'Please select at least one author';

**return**;

    }

**if** (this.selectedGenres.length **===** 0) {

      this.errorMessage **=** 'Please select at least one genre';

**return**;

    }

**if** (**!**this.selectedLanguage) {

      this.errorMessage **=** 'Please select a language';

**return**;

    }

**if** (**!**this.selectedPublisher) {

      this.errorMessage **=** 'Please select a publisher';

**return**;

    }

    this.isSubmitting **=** true;

    this.errorMessage **=** null;

    // Ensure authors have valid ids

**const** authors **=** this.selectedAuthors

      .filter(author **=>** author.id **!==** undefined)

      .map(author **=>** ({ id: author.id **as** number }));

    // Get image URL and handle error cases

**let** imageUrl **=** this.editBookForm.value.image **||** '';

**if** (this.imageLoadError **||** **!**imageUrl.trim()) {

      imageUrl **=** '';

    }

    // Create the book dto

**const** bookDto: CreateOrUpdateBookDTO **=** {

      title: this.editBookForm.value.name,

      price: parseFloat(this.editBookForm.value.price),

      languageId: this.selectedLanguage?.id **||** 0,

      publisher: {

        id: this.selectedPublisher?.id **||** 0

      },

      numberOfPages: parseInt(this.editBookForm.value.numberOfPages, 10),

      publicationYear: parseInt(this.editBookForm.value.publicationYear, 10),

      isbn: this.editBookForm.value.isbn,

      description: this.editBookForm.value.description **||** '',

      image: imageUrl,

      stockQuantity: parseInt(this.editBookForm.value.stockQuantity, 10),

      authors: authors,

      genres: this.selectedGenres

        .filter(genre **=>** genre.id **!==** undefined)

        .map(genre **=>** ({ id: genre.id **as** number }))

    };

    this.bookService.updateBook(this.bookId, bookDto).subscribe({

      next: () **=>** {

        this.isSubmitting **=** false;

        this.notificationService.success('Book updated successfully!');

        this.router.navigate(['/books']);

      },

      error: (err) **=>** {

        console.error('Error updating book:', err);

        this.isSubmitting **=** false;

        this.errorMessage **=** err.error?.message **||** 'An error occurred while updating the book. Please try again.';

      }

    });

  }

  @HostListener('document:click', ['$event'])

  onDocumentClick(event: Event): void {

**const** target **=** event.target **as** HTMLElement;

    // Close year picker when clicking outside

**if** (this.showYearPicker **&&**

**!**target.closest('.year-input-wrapper input') **&&**

**!**target.closest('.year-picker-toggle') **&&**

**!**target.closest('.year-picker')) {

      this.showYearPicker **=** false;

    }

    // Close language dropdown when clicking outside

**if** (this.showLanguageDropdown **&&**

**!**target.closest('.language-search-input') **&&**

**!**target.closest('.language-dropdown')) {

      this.showLanguageDropdown **=** false;

    }

    // Close author dropdown when clicking outside

**if** (this.showAuthorDropdown **&&**

**!**target.closest('.author-search-input') **&&**

**!**target.closest('.author-dropdown')) {

      this.showAuthorDropdown **=** false;

    }

    // Close genre dropdown when clicking outside

**if** (this.showGenreDropdown **&&**

**!**target.closest('.genre-search-input') **&&**

**!**target.closest('.genre-dropdown')) {

      this.showGenreDropdown **=** false;

    }

    // Close publisher dropdown when clicking outside

**if** (this.showPublisherDropdown **&&**

**!**target.closest('.publisher-search-input') **&&**

**!**target.closest('.publisher-dropdown')) {

      this.showPublisherDropdown **=** false;

    }

  }

  ngOnDestroy(): void {

    this.subscriptions.forEach(sub **=>** sub.unsubscribe());

  }

}

Google-books-api.component.ts

**import** { Component, OnInit } **from** '@angular/core';

**import** { FormBuilder, FormGroup, Validators } **from** '@angular/forms';

**import** { GoogleBooksService } **from** '../../services/google-books.service';
