**import** { BookService } **from** '../../services/book.service';

**import** { NotificationService } **from** '../../services/notification.service';

**import** { debounceTime, distinctUntilChanged, switchMap, catchError, of, forkJoin, tap, map } **from** 'rxjs';

**import** { Language } **from** '../../models/language.model';

**import** { Publisher } **from** '../../models/publisher.model';

**import** { Genre } **from** '../../models/genre.model';

**import** { Author } **from** '../../models/author.model';

@Component({

  selector: 'app-google-books-api',

  templateUrl: './google-books-api.component.html',

  styleUrls: ['./google-books-api.component.css']

})

**export** **class** GoogleBooksApiComponent **implements** OnInit {

  searchForm**!**: FormGroup;

  searchResults: any[] **=** [];

  isSearching **=** false;

  selectedBook: any **=** null;

  importForm**!**: FormGroup;

  isImporting **=** false;

  languages: any[] **=** [];

  publishers: any[] **=** [];

  genres: any[] **=** [];

  authors: any[] **=** [];

  newGenres: string[] **=** [];

  newAuthors: string[] **=** [];

  selectedGenres: number[] **=** [];

  selectedAuthors: Author[] **=** [];

  detectedGenres: string[] **=** [];

  newAuthorDetected **=** false;

  newPublisherDetected **=** false;

  newAuthor: any **=** { name: '', birthDate: null, biography: '' };

  newPublisher: any **=** { name: '', description: '', country: '' };

  languageSearchCtrl **=** this.fb.control('');

  languageSearchResults$ **=** of([] **as** Language[]);

  selectedLanguage: Language | null **=** null;

**constructor**(

**private** fb: FormBuilder,

**private** googleBooksService: GoogleBooksService,

**private** bookService: BookService,

**private** notificationService: NotificationService

  ) { }

  ngOnInit(): void {

    this.initForms();

    this.loadReferenceData();

    this.setupLanguageSearch();

    this.searchForm.get('searchTerm')?.valueChanges.pipe(

      debounceTime(500),

      distinctUntilChanged(),

      switchMap(term **=>** {

**if** (**!**term **||** term.length **<** 3) **return** of([]);

        this.isSearching **=** true;

**return** this.googleBooksService.searchBooks(term).pipe(

          catchError(err **=>** {

            this.notificationService.error('Error searching books');

            console.error('Search error:', err);

**return** of([]);

          })

        );

      })

    ).subscribe((results: any[]) **=>** {

      this.searchResults **=** results;

      this.isSearching **=** false;

    });

  }

  handleImageError(event: Event): void {

    this.googleBooksService.handleImageError(event);

  }

  initForms(): void {

    this.searchForm **=** this.fb.group({

      searchTerm: ['', [Validators.required, Validators.minLength(3)]],

      searchType: ['all']

    });

    this.importForm **=** this.fb.group({

      title: ['', Validators.required],

      price: [0, [Validators.required, Validators.min(0)]],

      languageId: ['', Validators.required],

      genreId: [''],

      addNewGenres: [false],

      newGenreName: [''],

      publisherId: ['', Validators.required],

      numberOfPages: [0, [Validators.required, Validators.min(1)]],

      publicationYear: [**new** Date().getFullYear(), Validators.required],

      isbn: [''],

      description: [''],

      image: [''],

      stockQuantity: [0, [Validators.required, Validators.min(0)]],

      addNewPublisher: [false],

      newPublisherName: [''], // Add this missing control

      addNewAuthors: [true],

      newAuthorName: [''],

      authorId: ['']

    });

  }

  loadReferenceData(): void {

    forkJoin({

      languages: this.bookService.getLanguages(),

      publishers: this.bookService.getPublishers(),

      genres: this.bookService.getGenres(),

      authors: this.bookService.searchAuthors('') // Get all authors

    }).subscribe(result **=>** {

      this.languages **=** result.languages;

      this.publishers **=** result.publishers;

      this.genres **=** result.genres **as** any[];

      this.authors **=** result.authors **as** any[];

    });

  }

  setupLanguageSearch(): void {

    // Load all languages first

    this.bookService.getLanguages().subscribe({

      next: (languages) **=>** {

        this.languages **=** languages;

        // Set up local filtering for better performance

        this.languageSearchResults$ **=** this.languageSearchCtrl.valueChanges.pipe(

          debounceTime(200),

          map(term **=>** {

**if** (**!**term) **return** this.languages.slice(0, 10); // Show first 10 languages when empty

**const** searchTerm **=** **typeof** term **===** 'string' **?** term.toLowerCase() **:** '';

**return** this.languages.filter(lang **=>**

              lang.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm)

            ).slice(0, 15); // Limit to 15 results

          })

        );

      }

    });

  }

  handleSearchTermChange(): void {

**const** term **=** this.searchForm.get('searchTerm')?.value;

**if** (**!**term **||** term.length **<** 3) {

      this.searchResults **=** [];

**return**;

    }

    this.isSearching **=** true;

    this.googleBooksService.searchBooks(term).pipe(

      catchError(err **=>** {

        this.notificationService.error('Error searching books');

        console.error('Search error:', err);

**return** of([]);

      })

    ).subscribe((results: any[]) **=>** {

      this.searchResults **=** results;

      this.isSearching **=** false;

    });

  }

  handleSearchTypeChange(): void {

    this.performSearch();

  }

  performSearch(): void {

**if** (this.searchForm.invalid) **return**;

**const** term **=** this.searchForm.get('searchTerm')?.value;

**const** type **=** this.searchForm.get('searchType')?.value;

    this.isSearching **=** true;

    this.googleBooksService.searchBooks(term, type).subscribe({

      next: (results: any[]) **=>** {

        this.searchResults **=** results;

        this.isSearching **=** false;

      },

      error: (err: any) **=>** {

        this.notificationService.error('Error searching books');

        console.error('Search error:', err);

        this.isSearching **=** false;

      }

    });

  }

  selectBook(book: any): void {

    this.selectedBook **=** book;

    this.resetNewEntities();

**const** volumeInfo **=** book.volumeInfo **||** {};

    this.detectedGenres **=** [];

    console.log('Book categories:', volumeInfo.categories);

    console.log('Book subjects:', volumeInfo.subjects);

**if** (volumeInfo.categories **&&** volumeInfo.categories.length **>** 0) {

      volumeInfo.categories.forEach((category: string) **=>** {

**const** splitCategories **=** category

          .split(/[,\/&]/)

          .map(c **=>** c.trim())

          .filter(c **=>** c.length **>** 0);

        this.detectedGenres.push(**...**splitCategories);

      });

    }

**if** (volumeInfo.subjects **&&** volumeInfo.subjects.length **>** 0) {

      volumeInfo.subjects.forEach((subject: string) **=>** {

**const** splitSubjects **=** subject

          .split(/[,\/&]/)

          .map(s **=>** s.trim())

          .filter(s **=>** s.length **>** 0);

        this.detectedGenres.push(**...**splitSubjects);

      });

    }

    this.selectedGenres **=** [];

    this.newGenres **=** [];

    this.detectedGenres **=** [**...new** Set(this.detectedGenres)];

    this.detectedGenres.forEach(genre **=>** {

**const** foundGenre **=** this.genres.find(g **=>**

        g.name.toLowerCase() **===** genre.toLowerCase());

**if** (foundGenre) {

        this.selectedGenres.push(foundGenre.id);

      } **else** {

        this.newGenres.push(genre);

      }

    });

    console.log('Matched genres:', this.selectedGenres);

    console.log('New genres:', this.newGenres);

    // Find matching language - with null safety checks

**let** languageId **=** '';

**let** languageFound **=** false;

**if** (volumeInfo.language) {

**const** foundLanguage **=** this.languages.find(l **=>**

        l.code **&&** volumeInfo.language **&&**

        l.code.toLowerCase() **===** volumeInfo.language.toLowerCase());

**if** (foundLanguage) {

        languageId **=** foundLanguage.id;

        languageFound **=** true;

      }

    }

    // Find or create matching publisher - with null safety checks

**let** publisherId **=** '';

**let** publisherFound **=** false;

**if** (volumeInfo.publisher) {

      // Normalize publisher name for comparison

**const** normalizedPublisherName **=** volumeInfo.publisher.toLowerCase().trim();

**const** foundPublisher **=** this.publishers.find(p **=>**

        p.name **&&** normalizedPublisherName **&&**

        p.name.toLowerCase().trim() **===** normalizedPublisherName);

**if** (foundPublisher) {

        publisherId **=** foundPublisher.id;

        publisherFound **=** true;

      } **else** {

        // Create a new publisher object with name

        this.newPublisher **=** {

          name: volumeInfo.publisher,

          description: '',

          country: ''

        };

        this.importForm.get('newPublisherName')?.setValue(volumeInfo.publisher);

      }

    }

    // Process authors

    this.selectedAuthors **=** [];

    this.newAuthors **=** [];

**if** (volumeInfo.authors **&&** volumeInfo.authors.length **>** 0) {

      volumeInfo.authors.forEach((authorName: string) **=>** {

**const** foundAuthor **=** this.authors.find(a **=>**

          a.name.toLowerCase() **===** authorName.toLowerCase());

**if** (foundAuthor) {

          // Push the entire author object, not just the ID

          this.selectedAuthors.push(foundAuthor);

        } **else** {

          this.newAuthors.push(authorName);

        }

      });

    }

    // After detecting new genres and authors

**if** (this.newGenres.length **>** 0) {

      // Pre-populate the first genre in the list

      this.importForm.get('newGenreName')?.setValue(this.newGenres[0]);

    }

**if** (this.newAuthors.length **>** 0) {

      // Pre-populate the first author in the list

      this.importForm.get('newAuthorName')?.setValue(this.newAuthors[0]);

    }

    this.importForm.patchValue({

      title: volumeInfo.title **||** '',

      languageId: languageId,

      publisherId: publisherId,

      numberOfPages: volumeInfo.pageCount **||** 0,

      publicationYear: volumeInfo.publishedDate **?**

        parseInt(volumeInfo.publishedDate.substring(0, 4)) **:** **new** Date().getFullYear(),

      isbn: volumeInfo.industryIdentifiers **?**

        volumeInfo.industryIdentifiers.find((id: any) **=>** id.type.includes('ISBN\_13'))?.identifier **||**

        volumeInfo.industryIdentifiers.find((id: any) **=>** id.type.includes('ISBN'))?.identifier **||** '' **:** '',

      description: volumeInfo.description **||** '',

      image: volumeInfo.imageLinks?.thumbnail **||** '',

      stockQuantity: 0,

      price: 0,

      addNewPublisher: **!**publisherFound **&&** **!!**this.newPublisher,

      addNewGenres: this.newGenres.length **>** 0, // Set to true if there are new genres

      addNewAuthors: this.newAuthors.length **>** 0 // Set to true if there are new authors

    });

  }

  // Reset new entity tracking

  resetNewEntities(): void {

    this.newGenres **=** [];

    this.newAuthors **=** [];

    this.selectedGenres **=** [];

    this.selectedAuthors **=** [];

    this.detectedGenres **=** [];

    this.newPublisher **=** null;

    this.newPublisherDetected **=** false;

  }

  // Toggle genre selection

  toggleGenre(genreId: number): void {

**const** index **=** this.selectedGenres.indexOf(genreId);

**if** (index **===** **-**1) {

      this.selectedGenres.push(genreId);

    } **else** {

      this.selectedGenres.splice(index, 1);

    }

  }

  // Toggle adding a new genre

  toggleNewGenre(genre: string): void {

**const** index **=** this.newGenres.indexOf(genre);

**if** (index **===** **-**1) {

      this.newGenres.push(genre);

    } **else** {

      this.newGenres.splice(index, 1);

    }

  }

  // Toggle author selection

  toggleAuthor(author: Author): void {

**const** index **=** this.selectedAuthors.findIndex(a **=>** a.id **===** author.id);

**if** (index **===** **-**1) {

      this.selectedAuthors.push(author);

    } **else** {

      this.selectedAuthors.splice(index, 1);

    }

  }

  // Add new entity to the database

  addNewEntity(type: string, name: string): void {

**if** (**!**name) **return**;

**if** (type **===** 'publisher') {

      // Fix: Use createPublisher instead of addPublisher and include more fields

      this.bookService.createPublisher({

        name: name.trim(),

        country: this.newPublisher?.country **||** '',

        description: this.newPublisher?.description **||** ''

      }).subscribe({

        next: (newPublisher: Publisher) **=>** {

          this.publishers.push(newPublisher);

          this.importForm.get('publisherId')?.setValue(newPublisher.id);

          this.importForm.get('addNewPublisher')?.setValue(false);

          this.newPublisher **=** null;

          this.notificationService.success('New publisher added');

        },

        error: (err: any) **=>** {

          // Improved error handling

**const** errorMsg **=** err.error?.message **||** err.message **||** 'Unknown error';

          this.notificationService.error('Error adding publisher: ' **+** errorMsg);

          console.error('Error details:', err);

        }

      });

    } **else** **if** (type **===** 'genre') {

      this.bookService.addGenre({ name }).subscribe({

        next: (newGenre: Genre) **=>** {

          this.genres.push(newGenre);

          this.selectedGenres.push(newGenre.id);

          this.importForm.get('addNewGenres')?.setValue(false);

          // Remove from newGenres array

**const** index **=** this.newGenres.indexOf(name);

**if** (index **!==** **-**1) {

            this.newGenres.splice(index, 1);

          }

          this.notificationService.success('New genre added');

        },

        error: (err: any) **=>** {

          this.notificationService.error('Error adding new genre');

          console.error(err);

        }

      });

    } **else** **if** (type **===** 'author') {

  // Ensure name is trimmed and not empty

**const** authorName **=** name.trim();

**if** (**!**authorName) {

    this.notificationService.error('Ім\'я автора не може бути порожнім');

**return**;

  }

  // Create proper author object with all required fields

**const** authorData **=** {

    name: authorName,

    biography: this.newAuthor?.biography **||** '',

    birthDate: this.newAuthor?.birthDate **||** null

  };

  this.bookService.createAuthor(authorData).subscribe({

    next: (newAuthor: Author) **=>** {

      // Add the complete author object to authors array

      this.authors.push(newAuthor);

      // Fix: Push the complete author object (not just ID) to selectedAuthors

      this.selectedAuthors.push(newAuthor);

      // Remove from newAuthors array

**const** index **=** this.newAuthors.indexOf(name);

**if** (index **!==** **-**1) {

        this.newAuthors.splice(index, 1);

      }

      this.notificationService.success(`Автора "${authorName}" успішно додано`);

    },

    error: (err: any) **=>** {

**const** errorMsg **=** err.error?.message **||**

                      err.error?.title **||**

                      err.error?.detail **||**

                      JSON.stringify(err.error) **||**

                      err.message **||**

                      'Невідома помилка';

      this.notificationService.error(`Помилка при додаванні автора: ${errorMsg}`);

      console.error('Error details:', err);

    }

  });

}

  }

  // Add new genres to the database

  addNewGenres(): void {

**if** (this.newGenres.length **===** 0) **return**;

**const** genreRequests **=** this.newGenres.map(name **=>** this.bookService.addGenre({ name }));

    forkJoin(genreRequests).subscribe({

      next: (newGenres: Genre[]) **=>** { // Add explicit type

        newGenres.forEach(genre **=>** {

          this.genres.push(genre);

          this.selectedGenres.push(genre.id);

        });

        this.newGenres **=** [];

        this.notificationService.success('New genres added');

      },

      error: (err: any) **=>** { // Add explicit type

        this.notificationService.error('Error adding new genres');

        console.error(err);

      }

    });

  }

  // Add this method to add a single new genre

  addSingleGenre(genreName: string): void {

**if** (**!**genreName) **return**;

    this.bookService.addGenre({ name: genreName }).subscribe({

      next: (newGenre: Genre) **=>** {

        // Remove from newGenres array

**const** index **=** this.newGenres.indexOf(genreName);

**if** (index **!==** **-**1) {

          this.newGenres.splice(index, 1);

        }

        // Add to existing genres and select it

        this.genres.push(newGenre);

        this.selectedGenres.push(newGenre.id);

        this.notificationService.success(`Genre "${genreName}" added to database`);

      },

      error: (err) **=>** {

        this.notificationService.error(`Failed to add genre: ${err.message}`);

        console.error('Error adding genre:', err);

      }

    });

  }

  // Add this method for manually adding a genre

  addManualGenre(genreName: string): void {

**if** (**!**genreName **||** genreName.trim().length **===** 0) **return**;

    genreName **=** genreName.trim();

    // Check if already in existing genres

**const** foundExistingGenre **=** this.genres.find(g **=>**

      g.name.toLowerCase() **===** genreName.toLowerCase());

**if** (foundExistingGenre) {

      // If already exists in database, just select it if not already selected

**if** (**!**this.selectedGenres.includes(foundExistingGenre.id)) {

        this.selectedGenres.push(foundExistingGenre.id);

        this.notificationService.success(`Genre "${genreName}" selected`);

      } **else** {

        this.notificationService.info(`Genre "${genreName}" is already selected`);

      }

**return**;

    }

    // Check if already in new genres

**if** (this.newGenres.some(g **=>** g.toLowerCase() **===** genreName.toLowerCase())) {

      this.notificationService.info(`Genre "${genreName}" is already in the new genres list`);

**return**;

    }

    // Add to new genres

    this.newGenres.push(genreName);

    this.notificationService.success(`Genre "${genreName}" added to new genres list`);

  }

  // Add this method for manually adding an author

  addManualAuthor(authorName: string): void {

**if** (**!**authorName **||** authorName.trim().length **===** 0) **return**;

    authorName **=** authorName.trim();

    // Check if already in existing authors

**const** foundExistingAuthor **=** this.authors.find(a **=>**

      a.name.toLowerCase() **===** authorName.toLowerCase());

**if** (foundExistingAuthor) {

      // If already exists in database, just select it if not already selected

**if** (**!**this.selectedAuthors.includes(foundExistingAuthor.id)) {

        this.selectedAuthors.push(foundExistingAuthor.id);

        this.notificationService.success(`Автор "${authorName}" вибраний`);

      } **else** {

        this.notificationService.info(`Автор "${authorName}" вже вибраний`);

      }

**return**;

    }

    // Check if already in new authors

**if** (this.newAuthors.some(a **=>** a.toLowerCase() **===** authorName.toLowerCase())) {

      this.notificationService.info(`Автор "${authorName}" вже в списку нових авторів`);

**return**;

    }

    // Add to new authors

    this.newAuthors.push(authorName);

    this.notificationService.success(`Автор "${authorName}" додано до списку нових авторів`);

  }

  // Add this method to handle new authors detected from Google Books API

  handleNewAuthor(authorName: string): void {

    this.newAuthorDetected **=** true;

    this.newAuthor **=** {

      name: authorName,

      birthDate: null,

      biography: ''

    };

  }

  // Add this method to handle new publishers detected from Google Books API

  handleNewPublisher(publisherName: string): void {

    this.newPublisherDetected **=** true;

    // Ensure we're creating a proper object with all needed fields

    this.newPublisher **=** {

      name: publisherName **||** '',

      description: '',

      country: ''

    };

  }

  importBook(): void {

**if** (this.importForm.invalid) {

      this.notificationService.warning('Please fill all required fields');

**return**;

    }

    this.isImporting **=** true;

**const** formData **=** this.importForm.value;

    // Handle potential new entities before submitting the book

**const** tasks **=** [];

    // Handle new author with additional fields if detected

**if** (this.newAuthorDetected) {

**const** authorTask **=** this.bookService.createAuthor({

        name: this.newAuthor.name,

        biography: this.newAuthor.biography **||** '',

        birthDate: this.newAuthor.birthDate

      }).pipe(

        tap((newAuthor: Author) **=>** {

          // Add to selected authors and clear detection flag

**if** (newAuthor.id **!==** undefined) {

          this.selectedAuthors.push(newAuthor);

          }

          this.newAuthorDetected **=** false;

        })

      );

      tasks.push(authorTask);

    }

    // Handle new publisher with additional fields if detected

**if** (this.newPublisherDetected) {

**const** publisherTask **=** this.bookService.createPublisher({

        name: this.newPublisher.name,

        description: this.newPublisher.description **||** '',

        country: this.newPublisher.country **||** ''

      }).pipe(

        tap((newPublisher: Publisher) **=>** {

          // Set as selected publisher and clear detection flag

          this.importForm.get('publisherId')?.setValue(newPublisher.id);

          this.newPublisherDetected **=** false;

        })

      );

      tasks.push(publisherTask);

    }

    // Continue with normal import flow after handling new entities

**if** (tasks.length **>** 0) {

      forkJoin(tasks).subscribe({

        next: () **=>** this.finalizeBookImport(formData),

        error: err **=>** {

          this.isImporting **=** false;

          this.notificationService.error('Error creating new entities: ' **+** err.message);

        }

      });

    } **else** {

      this.finalizeBookImport(formData);

    }

  }

  // Helper method to finalize the book import after handling new entities

  finalizeBookImport(formData: any): void {

    // Create a properly formatted book DTO object

**const** bookDto **=** {

      title: formData.title,

      price: parseFloat(formData.price),

      languageId: parseInt(formData.languageId, 10),

      publisher: { id: parseInt(formData.publisherId, 10) },

      numberOfPages: parseInt(formData.numberOfPages, 10),

      publicationYear: parseInt(formData.publicationYear, 10),

      isbn: formData.isbn **||** '',

      description: formData.description **||** '',

      image: formData.image **||** '',

      stockQuantity: parseInt(formData.stockQuantity, 10),

      // Fix: Format authors correctly

      authors: this.selectedAuthors

        .filter(author **=>** author.id **!==** undefined)

        .map(author **=>** ({ id: author.id **as** number })),

      // Update this if you still need to handle new authors:

      // You'll need to create them first before calling finalizeBookImport

      genres: this.selectedGenres.map(id **=>** ({ id }))

    };

    this.bookService.addBook(bookDto).subscribe({

      next: () **=>** {

        this.isImporting **=** false;

        this.notificationService.success('Book imported successfully');

        this.resetForms();

      },

      error: (err: any) **=>** {

        this.isImporting **=** false;

**const** errorMsg **=** err.error?.message **||** err.message **||** 'Unknown error';

        this.notificationService.error('Error importing book: ' **+** errorMsg);

      }

    });

  }

  resetForms(): void {

    this.searchForm.reset({ searchType: 'all' });

    this.importForm.reset({

      publicationYear: **new** Date().getFullYear(),

      stockQuantity: 0,

      price: 0,

      addNewPublisher: false

    });

    this.selectedBook **=** null;

    this.searchResults **=** [];

    this.resetNewEntities();

  }

  // Add this helper method to get genre name by ID

  getGenreName(genreId: number): string {

**const** genre **=** this.genres.find(g **=>** g.id **===** genreId);

**return** genre **?** genre.name **:** 'Unknown genre';

  }

  // Helper method to get publisher display name

  getPublisherDisplayName(): string {

**if** (this.newPublisher) {

**return** **typeof** this.newPublisher **===** 'object' **?** this.newPublisher.name **||** '' **:** this.newPublisher;

    }

**return** '';

  }

  // Helper method to check if newPublisher is object type

  isPublisherObject(): boolean {

**return** this.newPublisher **&&** **typeof** this.newPublisher **===** 'object';

  }

  // Methods for language selection

  selectLanguage(language: Language): void {

    this.selectedLanguage **=** language;

    this.languageSearchResults$ **=** of([]);

    this.importForm.patchValue({ languageId: language.id });

  }

  clearLanguage(): void {

    this.selectedLanguage **=** null;

    this.languageSearchCtrl.setValue('');

    this.importForm.patchValue({ languageId: '' });

  }

}
